items.body: Changing roles, going on leave, or handing over responsibilities no longer has to involve lengthy emails. The Handover Takeover App will provide a simple way to transfer tasks, while contributing to over KES 30 million in savings.
items.title: Handover Take Over App for branches

items.body: The Invoices App  will consolidate everything into one place, providing a centralized platform for invoice submission and improve the TAT processing by 11 days.
items.title: Invoice App for Finance

items.body: The Visitor Management App is being deployed across all NCBA group campuses, digitizing the reception desk experience from sign-in to sign-out.
items.title: Group Wide Visitor Management

items.body: An AI-driven compliance monitoring tool for the DMO department, surfacing data governance issues before they become regulatory risks.
items.title: DMO's Data Compliance (AI)

items.description: What if customer feedback could tell its own story? The AI Voice of the Customer solution automatically analyzes customer feedback, identifying trends, recurring issues, and areas of praise in real time. Instead of manually reviewing hundreds of comments, teams receive AI-generated insights, through automated dashboards and reports. Over 2,700 sentiments have been analyzed so far, helping teams quickly understand what matters most to customers and take action where it counts
items.title: AI Voice of the Customer

items.description: The Contact Centre relied on Zoom QM to review customer interactions and maintain service standards, but growing licensing costs made it difficult to scale across the Group. We reimagined the process by building an in-house Contact Centre Quality Management Tool on Power Apps, giving teams a simpler and more sustainable way to manage quality reviews. The solution now supports consistent customer experiences while delivering annual savings of KES 3.27 million in licensing costs.
items.title: Contact Centre Quality Management Tool

items.description: Starting a new job comes with a lot of excitement and, behind the scenes, a lot of emails, reminders, and follow-ups. That's where the HR Onboarding Bot steps in.This is HR's digital teammate, quietly working in the background to welcome all new Go-getters to the NCBA Insurance team. From sending letters and documents to reminding teams about reporting dates and probation milestones, the bot makes sure the right message reaches the right person at the right time.
items.title: HR Onboarding

items.description: Managing branded merchandise used to involve multiple emails, manual tracking, and potential losses. The Merchandise Hub brings everything into one place through a simple app that helps the MCC team to request, track, manage, and monitor NCBA merchandise more efficiently. The application workflow helps to reduce 2,288-man hours in a year, through streamlined approvals and follows. The MMC team can now focus on delivering memorable experiences for our customers.
items.title: Merchandise Hub

items.description: Every day, hundreds of KRA notices land in the team's inbox, and finding out which ones actually belong to NCBA customers used to take hours of searching and checking. Now, the KRA Agency Notices Bot takes the first pass. It reads the notices, checks the details, identifies which customers hold accounts with NCBA, and neatly sorts everything into the right folders for action. What used to take 2,400 hours to do annually is now completed in minutes.
items.title: KRA Report Automation bot

items.description: For the operations team in NCBA Uganda, every account summary report began with the same routine of pulling data, cleaning spreadsheets, and sorting thousands of accounts before a report is ready to share. Through REA, that routine has been transformed. A bot now prepares and distributes account summary reports from start to finish, delivering accurate, timely insights without the spreadsheet marathon while saving back 392 hours of manual work for the team.
items.title: NCBA Uganda's Account Summary Bot

items.description: Meet the Taxi Reporting Bot: Every month, thousands of taxi trips from Uber and Little Cab had to be reviewed, cleaned up, sorted by department, and shared with business heads for approval. Enter the Taxi Reporting Bot. Once the taxi reports are dropped into a shared folder, the bot gets to work, generating a report, emailing department Heads and even refreshing the Power BI dashboard. What previously took up to 10 working days and 80 hours a month can now be completed in minutes, for the entire NCBA Group.
items.title: Taxi Usage Reporting Bot

items.description: Getting a loan approved shouldn't feel like waiting in traffic. That's why two key workflow improvements were introduced to remove bottlenecks and bring decision-making closer to customers. Branch Managers and Regional General Managers can now approve selected facilities within defined limits, while an extra review step in Business Banking was removed to allow applications to move directly to appraisal.The result? Faster credit decisions and a combined turnaround time improvement of 18.4 hours per application, helping customers access financing sooner and the Business teams work more efficiently.
items.title: IBPS workflow enhancements [ Credit Processing Made Simpler]

innovation.sectionSub: What we have accomplished — and what's still coming

teaser.headline: Take a look at your ideas!

items.body: Here's the story behind the workflow that quietly changed how the bank signs off on everything.

story.body: Five to six years ago, Peter from Commercial Services had to move from office to office, campus to branch to get approvals for procurement papers and memos. Requests would sit unattended, requests would delay for weeks, and approvals often took days instead of minutes. The process was slow, and overwhelming. Today, this hustle is a thing of the past. With the Document Approval System, the entire process has been transformed into a seamless process. Documents are submitted in seconds, routed automatically, and approved in real time. Whether the boss is seated in the office or is away on a business trip, nothing comes to a standstill. Peter now monitors progress with ease, knowing exactly where each document is and who needs to act on it. What once felt hectic and stressful is now seamless and efficient. Since its launch, over 19,000 requests have been approved across the group via the Document Approval System, saving thousands of paper costs

closing.body: 96% same-day completion rate across all document types and business units.
closing.line: Document Approval is live across NCBA and is one of many deployed solutions that changed the way we work.

story.eyebrow: The Story of Peter and The Sign Offs
story.heading: The workflow that quietly changed how the bank signs off on everything.

items.title: Document Approval

items.description: What does the HR policy say on this?' One of the many questions that echoed across the bank for years. The search would begin by checking emails, looking for Policu Hub, or asking  colleagues for the latest version of a document. Valuable time was spent looking for answers instead of getting work done. Then came EVA. Today, finding information is as simple as chatting your question.  EVA brings the right information together in seconds helping teams make faster decisions and spend more time delivering value to our customers. So far, EVA has indexed 1,540 documents, supports 3,336 users, housed policies from 7 departments, and has already answered over 30,000 prompts and counting. When knowledge is easy to access, everyone works smarter.
items.title: EVA

items.description: A great internal service experience often ended with a simple 'Thank You!' and that was the end of the story. Valuable feedback was easily forgotten, opportunities to improve were missed, and teams had little visibility into how they were performing on their Internal Customer Satisfaction (ICSAT). The Rate My Service platform gave every interaction a voice. Now, Go-getters can share feedback in real time, celebrate great service, and highlight areas for improvement, all in one place. Over 4,000 ratings have been received, with a 96% satisfaction rate.
items.title: Rate My Service

items.description: Some of the longest delays weren't caused by the work itself—they happened while waiting for a document to be signed. A form would be printed, sent for approval, passed from desk to desk, and sometimes even across cities before it could move forward. Through REA, DocuSign Integration for Staff transformed that journey by allowing documents to be securely signed, tracked, and managed from anywhere. Today, approvals happen faster, documents are easier to monitor, and every signature leaves a secure digital audit trail. The impact speaks for itself: document turnaround time has dropped from 3 days to just 23.4 hours, with 85.36% of documents completed the same day, saving 698.75 man-hours, eliminating the need for 21,143 sheets of paper, and successfully processing 1,677 digital envelopes.
items.title: DocuSign for Staff

items.description: Once upon a time, carrying out suprise checks at the branches involved, printing checklists, updating manual records and printing out reports.  The new Branch Snap Check App helps Regional Branch Operations teams conduct surprise checks digitally, making it easier to capture findings,  monitor follow-up actions and mantain operational standards across the branches. The solution saved 90,865 and the branch teams lived happily every after.
items.title: Branch Snapcheck

items.description:
Ever wondered where all these PowerApps we keep talking about live? 
Welcome to the Automation Center. Managed by the BPM team, it's home to 32 Power Apps that are helping teams ditch paperwork, eliminate costs and make everyday tasks a little easier. Over the past year alone, BPM delivered 21 Power Apps and 52 automation bots, and we're just getting started. As new opportunities emerge, the Automation Center will continue to grow with solutions designed to simplify work, save time, and help us work smarter. Access the Automation Center here:
Access the Automation Center here:
https://apps.powerapps.com/play/e/7a3eb501-64ec-ed0a-adcb-23e9d3acc947/a/8ac4d707-662e-4526-b4b1-55baa4fd1d4a?hidenavbar=true
items.title: Automation Center
Six months of REA, in one sitting

bpm.body: Say hello to the BPM (Business Process Management & Transformation) team — the go-getters supporting REA and many of the improvements quietly transforming how NCBA operates. Led by our captain, Patrick Muchoki, we're not only excited by emerging technologies but also passionate about experimenting with them through proof-of-concepts (POCs). Beyond delivering solutions, we're probably building the next big thing — like Agent MARA, our 2026 Hackathon-winning innovation. And when it's time to switch gears, you'll find us brainstorming and sharing fresh perspectives while enjoying our much-loved Friday potluck together.
bpm.heading:
Meet BPM —
the team behind REA.

rea.body: Reduce, Eliminate, Automate : Every great improvement starts with an idea. REA is NCBA's way of making work simpler, one everyday frustration at a time. Launched in 2026, REA gives every Go-getter a voice: spot a messy task, a manual headache, or a step that just doesn't need to exist, and turn it into a real fix. Through the Innovation Nexus platform, those ideas get submitted, reviewed, and brought to life. Sometimes it's cutting out extra steps. Sometimes it's about automating the boring stuff. Either way, REA is quietly helping us work smarter, move faster, and put our customers first.
rea.heading: Reduce, Eliminate, Automate

people.actDesc: Who's driving innovative thinking and aiding the REA goals — one at a time.

items.contribution: Champion for AI Credit Memo across teams

items.contribution: First to pilot the FX Pre Trade checks
items.name: Team member

teaser.headline: Meet the people behind the ideas

testimonials.actDesc: "In their own words" Process owners tell us what actually changed once REA showed up.

items.name: Process Owner
items.quote: We used to chase approvals for two days. Now I find out before lunch.

items.name: Process Owner
items.quote: I was the one manually re-keying invoice data every morning. That job doesn't exist anymore.

items.name: Process Owner
items.quote: Quality reviews used to feel like a chore. Now they tell us something useful, fast enough to act on.

items.name: Process Owner
items.quote: Honestly I didn't believe it would work until I saw my own queue empty by 9am.

items.name: Process Owner
items.quote: We went from a two-week backlog to same-day, and nobody on the team works later for it.

buzzItems.body: Our Culture of Continuous Improvement (CI) was launched on 15 July, reinforcing our commitment to finding better ways of working every day. At the heart of this journey is REA, which is turning ideas into action by driving small improvements, smarter ways of working, and greater impact for our teams and our customers.
buzzItems.headline: Launch of Culture of Continuous Improvement

buzzItems.body: A simpler, faster way to access certified statements while improving convenience for our customers. Customers no longer need to visit a branch to have their statements certified. Through the Statement Printing Portal, certified statements can be generated and emailed directly to customers, complete with a branch electronic stamp and QR code for verification.
buzzItems.headline: Automated Certified Statements - Branch Visits Eliminated.

benefits: No immediate transactions required after activation
buzzItems.body: More convenience for customers, fewer interruptions, and a smoother banking experience for everyone. The account dormancy period has been extended from 3 months to 18 months, giving customers more time before their accounts become dormant. Once reactivated at a branch, the account remains active for 18 months even if no transaction is performed on the same day, while customers with balances below KES 10,000 can conveniently reactivate their accounts via the *388# short code without visiting a branch.
buzzItems.headline: Account Dormancy Is Getting Easier

buzzItems.body:
Sometimes the best innovations aren't new, they're the great solutions already making a difference today. 
We've seen suggestions on Innovation Nexus around enabling customers to access account statements instantly. The good news? This capability already exists on NCBA Now. Customers can generate and receive their account statements in real time through the app without visiting a branch or logging a service request. It's another example of how digital solutions already in place are simplifying customer journeys while reducing manual effort for our teams.
buzzItems.headline: Instant Customer Statements on NCBA Now

editorsPick.body: No more emailing invoices to the Tax team or logging into KRA eTIMS to complete fiscalization. The new solution connects our invoice-generating app directly to the KRA eTIMS platform, automatically submitting invoices for fiscalization and providing real-time updates to the teams. The result is less work and faster processing, throughout the Tax payment journey.
editorsPick.heading: Invoice Generation & eTIMS Integration

exitBanner.headline: Less Process. More Progress.
exitBanner.sub: Start with one process. Find what to reduce. Remove what we no longer need.
